description: Style NoteIt's not only women who like to experiment with the shape, styles and colours of their footwear as men are not far behind. Check out shoes for men from globalite. Globalite offers casual shoes in different styles which can go well with any outfit. Team these shoes with denims and a stylish tee to up your style quotient.Product DetailsBlack mid top shoe with central lace-ups and synthetic overlaysPadded and meshed tongue and inner Globalite midsoleTPU outsole with branded groovesThe shoes come with a bag to help you pack them when you travelMaterial and CareSynthetic leatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
